effect.curlamoety.acceleration_dance.des: Increase mobility and attack speed, decrease gravity
effect.curlamoety.dying_fight.descriptio: Increase the damage you cause and decrease the damage you suffer in short time
effect.curlamoety.generic_cooddown.descr: Cooldown of the enhanced servants' skill
curlamoety.lang.silver_rapier: The light of StarDust is shining on it
curlamoety.lang.zombie_arm: The dirty claw will poison your enemies
curlamoety.lang.platinum_punch: Punch of Platinum is rich in power of rage
curlamoety.lang.nuke_hammer: WARNING:USING THIS 'TOOL' WOULD CREATE DANGEROUS EXPLOSION
curlamoety.lang.cursed_fragment_1: A metal fragment that comes from smelting cursed armors
curlamoety.lang.cursed_fragment_2: The broken souls of fallen undead is still attahed to it
curlamoety.lang.old_necklace: A stained necklace, but there's still weak soul energy pulsing on it
curlamoety.lang.soul_necklace: A necklace reinforced by cursed metal, the soul energy within could enhance your spells
curlamoety.lang.death_necklace: A necklace strengthened by kinds of nether essences, the scent of death is hovering over it
curlamoety.lang.faith_necklace: A pioneering test upon the halo of apostle, create this necklace
curlamoety.lang.explorer_gloves: It could protect your hands well
curlamoety.lang.haste2: Grants Haste II, and has the ability of Kitchen Gloves
curlamoety.lang.conqueror_gloves: Your hands have conqueror numerous monsters
curlamoety.lang.haste2+: Grants Haste II, and has the ability of Kitchen Gloves, Grave Gloves, Thrash Gloves and Dauntless Glovse
curlamoety.lang.elemental_gloves_1: Fill your fists with the power of CATACLYSM
curlamoety.lang.elemental_gloves_2: Give your enemies kinds of harmful effects including Blazing Brand, and allows you to steal life through Blazing Brand
curlamoety.lang.kitchen_gloves_1: Just like the pair Mom wears at home
curlamoety.lang.kitchen_gloves_2: Knives and skillet(pan) is more powerful(unstackable)
curlamoety.lang.blood_ring: Fed by uncountable lives, this ring thrives
curlamoety.lang.dominator_ring: The symbol of your dominating of the world's greate magic power
curlamoety.lang.stella_ring: The power of cosmic stream into this ring
curlamoety.lang.hiker_boots: The dirt under the boots witnesses your journey
curlamoety.lang.runner_boots: The aspiration after speed would never be satisfied
curlamoety.lang.faded_promise_normal: The promise of the forgotten, the broken parts of which could still shelter you
curlamoety.lang.faded_promise_1_2: seconds, Faded Promise could protect you from next damage
curlamoety.lang.evil_spirit: A evil spirit condensed from curse. Maybe you could make use of its power to enhance your spells
curlamoety.lang.crypt_stone: Could be used to summon Wight on sabbath ritual
curlamoety.lang.valettein_1: Almost True Damage, cause deadly strikes that could even cut off Udying(hardly effective to Apllyon in nether)
curlamoety.lang.valettein_2: Give your enemies Cursed effect, and could decrease their max health permanently
curlamoety.lang.valettein_3: Attack when sneaking will dash like Riptide
curlamoety.lang.campfire: Get close to campfire will improve your regeneration
curlamoety.lang.apocalyptium_amorset_1: - Provides bonus slightly higher than Darkmage armor sets about
curlamoety.lang.middle_armorset: - Provides bonus similar to Dark Metal armor sets about
curlamoety.lang.void_echo: Could be split into Void Shard, so as to summon Ender Keeper again

curlamoety.lang.snap_warts_2: Could be cut into Crimson Fungus and Warped Fungus on Cutting Board

curlamoety.lang.amethyst_necklace: Stone Ministrosity and Redstone Ministrosity will persists
curlamoety.lang.metamorphic_scent_grass_: Must be planted on Rich Soil(Infini-Soil not included)
Grows slowly, but use a Bone Block could gain a few products
curlamoety.lang.variants: When summoned on a staff belonging to other category, the servant will change into a varient, which will enjoy the bonus of both side
curlamoety.lang.shift: Hold Shift to see special ability
curlamoety.lang.void_bottle: Bottling toward the void to obtain
curlamoety.lang.philosophers_stone_1: The legendary Philosophers's Stone, can cost durability to copy raw gold
curlamoety.lang.philosophers_stone_2: Will cost soul energy to self-repair
curlamoety.lang.philosophers_mace_2: Can speed the digging of all blocks, especially against Obsidien
curlamoety.lang.philosophers_mace_3: Could copy raw gold block by Right-Click it
curlamoety.lang.philosophers_mace_4: Has few durability, but will cost soul energy to self-repair
curlamoety.lang.blackmage_souls_statue_1: The statue shows an Undead Darkmage, combating

curlamoety.lang.witch_note: This notes can be organized into the book Witch's Sketch for read
curlamoety.lang.witch_note_1: Right-Click the Witch Writing Desk with
curlamoety.lang.witch_desk_1: A desk where you write down your inspiration
curlamoety.lang.witch_desk_2: When wearing a Witch Amulet, you can take notes here
curlamoety.lang.papers_t1: A note comes from observation on brewing
curlamoety.lang.papers_t2: A note comes from simple experiment about brewing
curlamoety.lang.papers_t3: A note comes from furthur researches into brewing
curlamoety.lang.papers_t3_trade: Witch and Warlock will be glad to pay their equipments for these valuable researches
curlamoety.lang.papers_t4_1: A somniloquence-like piece of record, it seems like you were possessed by evil spirits
curlamoety.lang.papers_t4_2: When you came to yourself and look at what you've written, a shiver went down your spine
curlamoety.lang.annihilation_ashes_1: The smoldering essence of the Witch's wrath
curlamoety.lang.annihilation_ashes_2: THe unholy flame will never stop burning, out of place in this world
curlamoety.lang.brimstone_orb_1: An orb, that has unholy brimstone fire burning within
curlamoety.lang.perfect: A block of perfectly generic item, probably too perfect
curlamoety.lang.witch_amulet_active: Potion effect gathers into the amulet
curlamoety.lang.rotten_wood: When wearing Rookie Witch Amulet, use Rotten Flesh toward any log to make that rotten
curlamoety.lang.no_mushroom: Mushroom need some space to grow
curlamoety.lang.mushrooms: When wearing Rookie Witch Amulet, use Water Bottle toward Rotten log to make mushroom grow on it
curlamoety.lang.can_brew: Can be used for witch brew
curlamoety.lang.need_level_30: Need at least 30 Experience Level to do that
curlamoety.lang.knowledge_toast: If you want to remember the knowledge, eating it might be a choice
curlamoety.lang.knowledge_toast_2: Gain Experience Points, and an Enchantment O'Bottle with a chance of 15%
curlamoety.lang.max_buff_update: The level of Buff has updated:
curlamoety.lang.inspiration_wand_1: Right-Click your servant to apply at least Buff I and some other effects
curlamoety.lang.inspiration_wand_2: Will record the level of Buff on this servant, so that this item can apply the same level of Buff
curlamoety.lang.shikishin_wand: Upgraded Inspiration Wand, can provide more effects
curlamoety.lang.night_catalyst: Can be used as a special catalyst that allows some necroturgy ritual recipes work on Crafttabl,not consumable
curlamoety.lang.evernight_veil: Can be used to summon the Nameless One (BOSS) again, or used to summon your Nameless One servant
curlamoety.lang.hostile_pea: Used at the Violet Force Field on the Final Castle to summon the Nameless One (BOSS)
curlamoety.lang.friendly_pea: Used at the Night Beacon to summon the Nameless One Servant of yours
curlamoety.lang.no_nameless_one_spawner: You CANNOT put this Spawn Egg into a spawner

curlamoety.lang.blackhouse2: Will place structure Black House, if used on a Stonebricks, with a Dark Oak Log beside
curlamoety.lang.blackhouse3: The position of the Dark Oak Log relative to the Stone Bricks indicates the direction in which the building extends.
curlamoety.lang.no_stonebricks: Use the blueprint on a Stone Bricks
curlamoety.lang.no_oak: Place 1 Dark Oak Log beside the Stone Bricks
curlamoety.lang.too_oak: DO NOT place more than 1 Dark Oak Log
curlamoety.lang.dao: Subscribe lovely 404 Dao-Chan, thank you meow

curlamoety.lang.abyss_stew: Can copy itself on Culinary Ritual
curlamoety.lang.desperate_attempt_1: Wish the Fate always stands with you
curlamoety.lang.desperate_attempt_2_1: Getting hit or attacking might obtain
curlamoety.lang.desperate_attempt_3: With higher Luck and Low Health rate, this will be more effective

curlamoety.lang.monstrosity_caller_2: Use at a Redstone Block will summon a Hostile Redstone Monstrosity
curlamoety.lang.monstrosity_caller_3: Use at a Mushroom Coated Alloy Block will summon a Hostile Mushroom Monstrosity
curlamoety.lang.prisoner_pickaxe_1: This pickaxe is extremely sturdy but blunt, it's hard to imagine how the prisoners mine with such thing
curlamoety.lang.prisoner_pickaxe_2: When given to a prisoner, clear and regive the prisoner Haste effect, which level is the pickaxe's efficiency's enchant level +1
curlamoety.lang.enderhero_1: Ohhh...This sword, it's mine own sword
curlamoety.lang.enderhero_2: Is it true that thou hast slain the Ender Dragon?
curlamoety.lang.enderhero_3: If so, then the swordcraft wherewith I guard this Final Terminal...
curlamoety.lang.enderhero_4: Thou shalt take it upon thy flesh and thereby learn it
curlamoety.lang.curlamoety:sword_cookie_: Eating it will increase the damage of Blade-Of-Ender-like weapons
Feeding it to your Ender Keeper Servant will strengthen him

curlamoety.lang.chlorophium_breaker_0: Has the features of multiple tools

curlamoety.lang.chaos_cube: This cube is filled with irreconcilable chaotic energy. You can't just use this semi-finished product as it is.
curlamoety.lang.goal_ty: Your controll over the Spells has reach the top. Even impossible things will come true
curlamoety.lang.twilight_sparkle: Through this tiny crack you can see the beginning of the world that is infinity time before
curlamoety.lang.calamity_source: The source of the supernaturals. The chaotic fire that breeds myths

curlamoety.lang.storm_pants: Theres's a thick smell of tide, mellow as wine
curlamoety.lang.snow_pants: The frosty fabric has a faint smell like wintersweet

curlamoety.lang.enderhero_fake: You can't make up a fake hero
